## Meeting Purpose

[Tech check and platform walkthrough for Marcel Santilli's upcoming workshop at DEMAND event.](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is experienced with virtual events (hosted 3 conferences, including one with 30k attendees)](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Goldcast platform will be used; Marcel to familiarize with login, navigation, and backstage access](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Speaker link provided; tech check and profile setup required before each login](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

## Topics

### Platform Access and Navigation

  - [Speakers use a unique link to access the Goldcast platform](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Landing page: Click "Enter Event" in bottom right corner](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Mandatory tech check: camera, microphone, audio, virtual background options](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Profile setup/verification required at each login](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Navigate to Agenda, scroll to session, click "Enter Backstage"](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Speaker Experience

  - [Marcel has extensive virtual event experience (3 conferences hosted)](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Familiar with general process, new to Goldcast specifically](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Previous event managed 30,000 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [No virtual background preferred for natural look](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Screen sharing will be available and tested during tech check](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Potential conflicts between Zoom and Goldcast camera usage noted](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

### Event Preparation

  - [Speaker link shared via chat and calendar invite for easy access](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Mia will meet Marcel in the backstage area on event day](https://fathom.video/share/3kPEHbHF-JnN47XBzyWoEK-q3VsxzP9n?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to use provided link to access Goldcast platform
  - Complete tech check and profile setup
  - Familiarize with navigation to workshop session and backstage area
  - Prepare for workshop delivery on DEMAND event day
